notes: Default shape: N=32, H=W=200, groups=64, cpg=kpg=4, R=S=3, pad=1.
Uses mfma_f32_4x4x4_f16: 16 independent 4x4x4 matmuls per wave.
block_q=8 processes two 4-wide Q tiles per wave.
Wide vec2-dword epilogue (1 buffer_store_dwordx2 per lane) fuses the 4 per-lane fp16 outputs into one global store. Reaches ~45-49 TFLOPS warm.
The example-test path verifies correctness first, so the lower bound is conservative against thermal noise.
